rank_obstruction_summary.claim_boundary: Diagnostic obstruction summary for the target-rank-free overlap-graph spectrum. It explains why strict neutral bulk is not promoted; it is not itself a strict-bulk receipt.

gate_coincidence_summary.claim_boundary: Gate-coincidence diagnostic only. Strict neutral bulk still requires spatial-H3 geometry and an independent rank-3 selector to pass in the same neutral witness.

claim_boundary: Observer-overlap graph parameter sweep. It broadens the search for strict-H3/rank-3 neutral geometry, but each row remains diagnostic. It does not promote strict neutral bulk unless the independent-rank, H3/leakage, refinement, and frontier gates all pass.
